/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libdomain_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdomain_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/domain_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/domain_bridge/msg/detail/compressed_msg__description.c.o CMakeFiles/domain_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/domain_bridge/msg/detail/compressed_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/domain_bridge__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/domain_bridge/msg/detail/compressed_msg__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/syfra/ros2_jazzy/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/home/syfra/ros2_jazzy/install/rcutils/lib: /home/syfra/ros2_jazzy/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /home/syfra/ros2_jazzy/install/rcutils/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
